LanguageData.Ammo_20x110mmHispano_AP.label: 20x110mm Hispano (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_20x110mmHispano_AP.description: Large caliber cartridge used by autocannons and a handful of anti-tank rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_20x110mmHispano_Incendiary.label: 20x110mm Hispano (AP-I)
LanguageData.Ammo_20x110mmHispano_Incendiary.descript: Large caliber cartridge used by autocannons and a handful of anti-tank rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_20x110mmHispano_HE.label: 20x110mm Hispano (AP-HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_20x110mmHispano_HE.description: Large caliber cartridge used by autocannons and a handful of anti-tank rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_20x110mmHispano_Sabot.label: 20x110mm Hispano (Sabot)
LanguageData.Ammo_20x110mmHispano_Sabot.description: Large caliber cartridge used by autocannons and a handful of anti-tank rifles.
LanguageData.Bullet_20x110mmHispano_AP.label: 20mm Hispano bullet (AP)
LanguageData.Bullet_20x110mmHispano_Incendiary.label: 20mm Hispano bullet (AP-I)
